Title: The Ironworks of Lake County
Author: Harold Olsen
Notes: Bought in print at Anderson's too. Listening on the Riverwalk, reading in the armchair, meeting in the middle.

Title: The Wager
Author: David Grann
Notes: Shipwreck, mutiny, and competing reports. Engineers would call it a root cause dispute.

Title: Grant
Author: Ron Chernow
Notes: Two months of walks well spent. The man was better than his reputation.

Title: The Splendid and the Vile
Author: Erik Larson
Notes: Larson never misses. Recommended to Janet, who had already read it, naturally.

Title: The Worst Hard Time
Author: Timothy Egan
Notes: Dust bowl. Made me grateful for Illinois rain, which is not a sentence I say often.

Title: Truman
Author: David McCullough
Notes: The long ones are the good ones at a walking pace.

Title: The Path Between the Seas
Author: David McCullough
Notes: Panama Canal. Engineering against malaria and mud. Tom and I argued locks versus sea level for a month, happily.

Title: Killers of the Flower Moon
Author: David Grann
Narrator: Will Patton, Ann Marie Lee, Danny Campbell

Title: The Boys in the Boat
Author: Daniel James Brown
Notes: Carol had recommended this one years ago. She was right, as the record consistently shows.

Title: A Walk in the Woods
Author: Bill Bryson
Notes: Funny enough that other walkers on the Riverwalk gave me looks.

Title: The Guns of August
Author: Barbara Tuchman
Notes: A re-read, or re-listen. Still the standard.

Title: Empire of the Summer Moon
Author: S. C. Gwynne
Notes: Quanah Parker. Filed under reasons to take the train through the Southwest.

Title: Membership
Author: Audible 1 credit per month, $14.95
Notes: Renews monthly, billed to BMO checking. See budget, subscriptions line.
